description: Machine-readable inventory of editable UI Backlot surfaces for focused HyperFrames assembly.

surfaces.title: Editable Browser App
surfaces.fidelity: generic browser/web-app shell, donor-informed
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS; uses donor repos as geometry reference without vendoring runtime components.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Browser-backed demos such as SaaS tools, internal dashboards, Airtable-like scenes, or web research workflows.
